interviewProcess: Online test: 90 mins on Hackerrank with 3 problems (one Python specific, one tree/graph related, one array problem related to nearest smaller element to left/right).
dsaTopics: Letter Combinations of a Phone Number
Single Element in a Sorted Array
Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock III
Insert into a Binary Search Tree
Kth Largest Element in an Array
Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
Lowest Common Ancestor of a Binary Tree
Winner of an election where votes are represented as candidate names
systemDesignTopics: Determine if a new booking can reuse an existing court or requires a new one given infinite courts and their booking times.
enrichedInsights: The interview process at Atlassian for an SDE role typically involves an online assessment followed by multiple technical rounds. The online test often includes 3 problems with a 90-minute time limit, covering areas like array manipulation, tree/graph traversal, and sometimes language-specific challenges. Technical interviews can involve coding problems and discussions around past projects, focusing on technical depth, problem-solving approach, debugging skills, handling corner cases, and communication. Candidates are encouraged to express their thought process clearly. The overall experience seems to be structured and aims to assess a candidate's ability to tackle complex problems systematically.
